title: Project Report: Customer Service Case Management — Dynamics 365 CRM Consultant
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
summary: Case entity with queues, SLAs, routing rules, knowledge articles, and Power Automate notifications.
objectives: Power Automate Teams notification on case creation
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Intermediate)*

**Customer Service Case Management** is a intermediate-level end-to-end project for Dynamics 365 CRM Consultant. Duration: 3–4 weeks. Case entity with queues, SLAs, routing rules, knowledge articles, and Power Automate notifications. Tools: Dynamics 365 CS, Power Automate.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: Case queues by priority
Objective: SLA timers on cases
Objective: Routing rules to teams
Objective: Power Automate Teams notification on case creation
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
Dynamics 365 CRM Consultant portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a Dynamics 365 CRM Consultant resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a Dynamics 365 CRM Consultant resume with a demo link.

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Intermediate)*

Submit all final deliverables: Case config doc; SLA setup; Flow demo video. Skills demonstrated: Customer Service, SLA, Power Automate. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: Case config doc
Deliverable: SLA setup
Deliverable: Flow demo video
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits Case config doc and passes the rubric.
